features: Specially formulated for everyday skin cleansing
Made with tea tree oil, a natural antibacterial ingredient
Known for its iconic coal tar fragrance
Hands are deeply cleansed and nourished
Leaves hands feeling soft and smooth, dermatologically tested
description: Product Description Established in 1860, WRIGHT’S has been a family favourite for more than 160 years. Created by William Valentine Wright, the products still retain their honest natural appeal. The liquid hand wash is specifically formulated for everyday skin cleansing. Containing tea tree oil, the wash leaves hands feeling soft and smooth. It is recognised for its iconic coal tar fragrance. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulftate, Cocamide DEA, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Chlorite, Glycerin, Parfum, Citric Acid, Disodium EDTA, Melalecua Alternaifolia Leaf Oil, Polyquaternium-7, Eugenol, Sodium Benzoate, Hexyl Cinnamal, Cinnamal, Magnesium Nitrate, Sodium Hydroxide, Methylchloroisothiazolinone, Magnesium Chloride, Methylisothiazolinone, CI 19140, CI 15510.
